svg.title: ResearchMind multi-agent architecture diagram
svg.desc: Four-agent pipeline: Search Agent and Reader Agent feed combined research into Writer Chain, which feeds Critic Chain, producing a final report with PDF export.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of research topics can ResearchMind handle?')

g.text: Session state · pipeline orchestration · result display

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Search Agent find information?')
sendPrompt('How does the Reader Agent scrape web content?')
sendPrompt('How does the Writer Chain generate the report?')
sendPrompt('What does the Critic Chain evaluate in the report?')
sendPrompt('What does the final research report include?')
sendPrompt('How is the PDF report generated?')
sendPrompt('What does the critic feedback show?')
